title: The Crew Regroups Outside Nanohana
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on the crew regroups outside nanohana, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: The Crew Regroups Outside Nanohana. Ace steps between Luffy and the Marines, showing his strength while Vivi pushes the mission toward stopping Crocodile. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: ACE!

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: 'Sup.

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: Oh, but first- Thanks for taking care of my trouble- some little brother.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yes, he really is quite a handful.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So what're you doing here in this country?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hm? Did you not get my message at Drum Island?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: At Drum Island?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ah, whatever. It's not too important.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm just glad I met up with you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I've been sailing the seas around here for a little business I have to take care of,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And I thought it'd be nice to see you once before sailing off again.

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: Luffy... What d'ya say to joining the Whitebeard Pirates that I'm in?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Course, all your friends are welcome too.

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: I dum' wanna.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ahahaha... I knew you'd say that. Just wanted to ask, that's all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: White- beard!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then that mark on your back is the real thing?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yeah, it's my pride and honour...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He's by far and above the best pirate I've ever known.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And I want to make him the Pirate King, not you, Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: It's fine.

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: I'll just fight him later then!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: If you wanna talk, why don't you come aboard? I'll pour you some tea.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Nah, it's fine. No need to mind me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'm not gonna be here for too long, anyways.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hmm, there aren't any marines chasing us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yeah, that's because I took care of 'em with my "Mera Mera" abilities.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Damn it! There's a huge wall of fire!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We've lost all sight of the Straw Hat pirates thanks to his fires!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What should we do, captain!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Captain! We just received a report that Mr.11 who we left tied up onboard has been killed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Alabasta´s a large country... It`s gonna be tough to find them again after letting them get away once.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Pamm that Portgas...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Capt. Smoker! Forgive me for arriving late!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What happened to the Straw Hat Pirates!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Just where the hell have you been all this time, Tashigi...

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: Well, in the other side of town...

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: Sesh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Sseargent, please!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Vivi was with them...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What do you make of this...?

summary: This part highlights the crew regroups outside nanohana and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
